content.en:
At first, the entrance was relatively unstable, but gradually it stabilized completely.

"Let's go inside!"

Yazu told Ye Tiandao.

Swish!!!!!

The members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and the Reincarnation Source Clan have entered the Reincarnation Fruit Realm one after another.

......

"Yazu, do you think your Reincarnation Heavenly Clan will be able to snatch a few Reincarnation Supreme Fruits this time?"

A nine-time awakened reincarnation source clan said with a smile.

He is the Yizu of the reincarnation source clan, and his strength is no less than that of Yazu, but the contradiction with Yazu is very deep, if it were not for this occasion, they would definitely have to fight.

"At least sixty percent!"

Yazu said confidently.

"Hehe, sixty percent?" Yi Zu sneered, "The last time eighteen reincarnation supreme fruits were born, you only snatched eight reincarnation supreme fruits, not even fifty percent." Where did you get the courage to say sixty percent, I estimate that you can snatch four achievements this time, our reincarnation source clan can cultivate a very powerful five awakening origin upper realm overlord this time, but it is not something you can compare. "

Hearing Yizu's words, Yazu also trembled in his heart, and became a little worried.

The strength of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan is about the same as that of the Reincarnation Source Clan, but the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Reincarnation Origin Clan is good at all kinds of weird techniques, and in the early stage of individual battles, the Reincarnation Celestial Clan suffers, and it is normal to be a little weaker.

"If Aochen is also awakened five times, he can definitely sweep the invincible!"

Yazu said darkly.

It's a pity that there is too late, even if the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan fully assists Ao Chen to improve his cultivation, it will not be too late to break through to the four awakening realms, let alone the five awakening realms.

And apart from Ao Chen, the reincarnation celestial clan really doesn't have any geniuses at the level of the fifth awakening.

Therefore, he was also worried that the Reincarnation Celestial Clan would suffer heavy losses this time.

"As long as Aochen doesn't die, and snatches the supreme fruit of reincarnation, and successfully awakens the second reincarnation supreme supernatural power, then the loss is worth it!" Yazu thought.

......

Reincarnation Fruit Realm.

Ye Tian entered here, and the Reincarnation Source Clan and the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan were separated, and they didn't fight here, so there was no need.

In the blink of an eye, the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the two clans disappeared, and Ye Tian also left quickly.

Soon.

Ye Tian saw a divine tree that ran through countless time and space.

If it were in the outside world, such a divine tree would be extremely rare, but in the reincarnation fruit world, such a divine tree was just an ordinary divine tree, without any threat, without giving birth to any fruit, and without any value.

Ye Tian had a lot of information about the reincarnation fruit world, all of which was given to him by Yazu.

If he finds something good, he will almost always recognize it and will not miss it.

"This sacred tree is of no value, get out of here!"

Ye Tian walked through here and continued to search for treasures.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to discover something good.

"This is—the Tree of Minya!"

Ye Tian saw an unimaginable divine tree in front of him, its power was very majestic, and hundreds of fruits had grown on it.

In the information of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, this tree is called the Tree of Minia, and the fruit that bears on it is called the Minia Divine Fruit, which helps to enhance the will of the Origin Realm, as well as the power of the bloodline to weakly.

For the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, the value of such a Minia Divine Fruit is not too great, and they are reluctant to use it for cultivating slaves, and the Reincarnation Celestial Clan does not need to improve the will of the Origin Upper Realm, so such a resource is a bit chicken for them.

But.

The Minia Divine Fruit was of high value to Ye Tian.

He didn't say a word, and went directly to pick the Minia Divine Fruit.

However, as he approached the sacred tree of Minya, a long branch came like a spear.

This kind of attack power is very powerful, and it is definitely comparable to the full force of the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Five Awakenings.

But for Ye Tian, such an attack was too ordinary.

His duplicate body is enough to rival the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has awakened seven times, where would he be afraid of such a Minia Divine Tree!

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian held the Reincarnation Arcana Spear, smashed the branches of the Minya Divine Tree with one shot, and pierced it with one shot.

The body of the Tree of Reincarnation of Minya was pierced, and its aura became extremely weak, and it was almost on the verge of death.

Even if Ye Tian didn't continue to attack, it would have to take countless years to repair its injuries.

"Hand over all the Minia Divine Fruits, or you will surely die!"

Ye Tian threatened.

According to the information of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, the reincarnation trees here all possess a certain amount of wisdom and will naturally understand his words.

Really.

This Minya Reincarnation Tree handed over all the Minia Divine Fruits on his body and handed them to Ye Tian, allowing Ye Tian to take all the Minia Divine Fruits.

Ye Tian put away these Minia Divine Fruits, and then left here.

The Reincarnation Fruit Realm is not only about these reincarnation tree fruits, but also gives birth to other resources, which are no worse than other treasure lands.

Of course.

Ye Tian's main goal is still the Supreme Fruit of Reincarnation.

But it is not easy to find the supreme fruit of reincarnation, there is only one kind of reincarnation tree that gives birth to the supreme fruit of reincarnation - the reincarnation ancestral tree, and the reincarnation ancestral tree has a high level of wisdom, and it can move and hide.

Moreover, the strength of the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree is very strong, even if the traces of the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree are really discovered, they must unite, and a large number of reincarnation celestial clans that have awakened five times will unite in order to have any hope of snatching the Reincarnation Supreme Fruit from the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree.

Moreover, if you are not careful, you can die.

In order to snatch the supreme fruit of reincarnation every time, it is too normal to fall a few reincarnation celestial clans.

He could stay in the Reincarnation Fruit Realm for ten primeval eras, and the time was quite sufficient, but he was not in a hurry to find the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian found a lot of resources.

this day.

He encountered a reincarnation source.

Moreover, they also discovered a reincarnation tree - the reincarnation Xuanlin tree, which bears a good thing called the reincarnation Xuanlin fruit, which can greatly improve the physical body and origin.

For the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and the Reincarnation Source Clan, the Reincarnation Xuanlin Fruit is a good thing, and its value is no less than that of the Reincarnation Flowing Essence!

The reincarnation source clan that Ye Tian met was extremely excited when he saw this reincarnation Xuanlin tree, and without saying a word, he killed Ye Tian directly, he wanted to kill Ye Tian and swallow the reincarnation Xuanlin fruit on this reincarnation Xuanlin tree alone.

However.

Ye Tian didn't even look at the other party, took out the reincarnation treasure on his body, and stabbed it with a shot.

Burst!

Kills the opponent in an instant.

Such a five-time awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord was too weak for him, and he could be killed with a single blow.
